params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

items.docs: Returns all leagues the authenticated account has permission to access. Each league includes an ID, name, country, and optional logo URL.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: leagueId
params.description: The unique identifier of the league.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific league including name, country, current season, and logo URL.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: leagueId
params.description: Filter seasons by league ID.

items.docs: Returns all available seasons for the leagues accessible to the authenticated account.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: leagueId
params.description: Filter matches by league ID.

params.name: seasonId
params.description: Filter matches by season ID.

params.name: teamId
params.description: Filter matches involving a specific team.

params.name: date
params.description: Filter matches by date (YYYY-MM-DD).

params.name: status
params.description: Filter matches by status.

items.docs: Returns matches filtered by league, season, team, or date. Supports live score updates, scheduled fixtures, and completed results.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: matchId
params.description: The unique identifier of the match.

items.docs: Retrieves full details for a specific match including score, lineups, events, statistics, and head-to-head history between the two teams.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: leagueId
params.description: Filter teams by league ID.

params.name: seasonId
params.description: Filter teams by season ID.

items.docs: Returns teams filtered by league or season. Includes team name, country, logo, and founding information.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: teamId
params.description: The unique identifier of the team.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific team including squad, statistics, and season data.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: playerId
params.description: The unique identifier of the player.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific player including profile, career history, and season statistics.

params.name: apikey
params.description: Your Statorium API token for authentication.

params.name: leagueId
params.description: The league ID for which to retrieve standings.

params.name: seasonId
params.description: The season ID (defaults to current season).

items.docs: Retrieves league standings table for a specific league and season including team position, points, wins, draws, losses, goals for, goals against, and goal difference.
